_comment: Two MCP servers — both bundled with the plugin. Zero network needed.
1. jank-ai — the core Jank MCP server. Provides every mcp__jank-ai__*
tool referenced in the skills (jank_session_start, jank_open_tabs,
./server/ with node_modules pre-installed — no npm fetch on first run.
2. playwright — used by the headless browser path inside /jank.
Defaults to the SHARED USER-DATA + dedicated 'Jank Test' profile
recipe, which gives fast headless runs WITH your real Chrome's
ONE-TIME SETUP before /jank works (the live-browser command):
2. Name the new profile EXACTLY 'Jank Test'
3. Switch to it and log into staging / SSO / what you want tested
Slash commands that DON'T need this setup: /jank_light, /jank_cloud,
/jank_clean. Those work out of the box.
